PROP-01b-partial1-inv-007.text: isValidSignature must enforce buyToken == s_assetOut to prevent solver specifying arbitrary output token.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-007.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.buyToken == s_assetOut; else revert InvalidBuyToken

locations.note: buyToken check at lines 135-137: order.buyToken != s_assetOut => revert InvalidBuyToken
